session.assistant:
No objective link — skipping Steps 5 and 6.
### Step 7: Results
Plan "Extract generic `inject_metadata_block_before_footer` utility" saved as draft PR #8631 URL: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8631
Next steps:
View PR: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8631
In Claude Code: Dispatch to queue: `/erk:pr-dispatch` — Dispatch plan for remote agent implementation
OR exit Claude Code first, then run one of:
Same slot (recommended — you're in a slot): Local: `erk br co --for-plan 8631` Implement: `source "$(erk br co --for-plan 8631 --script)" && erk implement --dangerous`
New slot: Local: `erk br co --new-slot --for-plan 8631` Implement: `source "$(erk br co --new-slot --for-plan 8631 --script)" && erk implement --dangerous`
Dispatch to Queue: `erk pr dispatch 8631`
### Push Planning Session

tool_use.name: Bash
